chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Revision Application No.S-74 of 2023. ______________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE______________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 12-02-2025 Mr. Syed Muhammad Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo. DPG. -------- Learned counsel for the applicant called absent without intimation. R&Ps shows that after filing of the instant Cr. Revision, learned counsel for the applicant has preferred to remain absent. In the interest of justice a chance is accorded and if on next date, learned counsel for the applicant or his counsel fails to appear to argue the Cr. Revision application, appropriate order shall be passed in accordance with the law on the basis of material placed on the record, after hearing the learned DPG. To come up on 26-02-2025. JUDGE
